BackstoryDef.title: Living zombie cure
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was held captive by [PAWN_possessive] government following a rapid zombie-like viral outbreak. [PAWN_nameDef] was unwillingly infected and experimented on by scientists in a secure lab in hopes of developing a cure. They were eventually successful in making a cure, but it left [PAWN_nameDef] with deep-rooted brain damage.
